title: Bike Chain Tool Set: Bike Chain Link Pliers & Bike Chain Splitter Tool & Chain Wear Tool & 3 Bike Riveting, Mountain Bike Bicycle Chain Tool Set for 6/7/8/9/10 Speed Chains Link Repair Tool Kit
features: Sturdy and Durable Material: The bicycle chain tool is made of high-quality steel with exquisite workmanship, wear-resistant, not easy to break, bend or break, high strength, high hardness, stable performance, long-lasting durability and stability.

Bicycle Link Plier: The bicycle chain tool adopts an ergonomic handle design, comfortable to hold, time-saving and labor-saving operation. Easy to remove the chain link, easy to reinstall the chain link, perfect for easily fixing the bicycle chain! Perfect match for all your bicycle chain repairs.

Bike Chain Splitter Tool: The chain link removal tool is used to quickly and accurately remove and install chain pins and remove chain links and easily reinstall chain links. The unique groove on the top allows you to easily see how far the pin pops out and remove the cut chain with the pin from the tool.

Chain Wear Indicator & Bicycle Chain Rivets: High-precision bicycle chain gauge can quickly and easily measure wear. 3 pairs of bicycle chain rivets of different models, one pairs of 8-speed, 9-speed, 10-speed, with a wide matching range.

description: What are the advantages of our bicycle chain tool? The chain link pliers set is made of high-quality steel, with exquisite workmanship, wear-resistant, not easy to break, and has long-lasting durability and stability. The chain breaker tool is designed to quickly and accurately remove and install chain pins and easily remove and reinstall chain links. The chain splitter tool bicycle adopts an ergonomic handle design, which is comfortable to hold and time-saving and labor-saving to operate. Small in size, durable, and easy to carry, the chain tool can repair most problems of bicycles. Compatible with 6/7/8/9/10 speed bikes, suitable for hiking bikes, road bikes, city bikes, mountain bikes, racing bikes, etc. Features: Material: Steel Color: Black Size: As Shown Package Includes: 1 x Black Bike Chain Plier 1 x Bike Chain Splitter 1 x Chain Wear Indicator 3 x Bicycle Chain Rivets Warranty after sale: If you have any questions, please contact us in time, and we will solve your questions ASAP.
